basic_details.short_information: Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) has released the official Psychiatrist Notification 2026 on 17 July 2026 at the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced under the CGPSC Psychiatrist Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 25 to 35 years with a Postgraduate degree in a relevant specialty and registration with the Indian Medical Council can apply online from the start date as mentioned in the notification to 19 August 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. Specific relaxations include: Chhattisgarh residents: Up to 40 years SC/ST/OBC: 5 years Chhattisgarh Govt. Employees: Up to 38 years Retrenched Govt. Servants: Up to 3 years (max) Ex-Servicemen: 3 years Chhattisgarh Local Women: 10 years Widow/Divorcee/Separated Women: 5 years Awardees/Players: 5 years Contractual Employees: Service period (max 38 years) Disabled Persons: 5 years Education Personnel/Panchayat Personnel: Up to 45 years Inter-Caste Marriage Scheme Beneficiaries: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in a relevant specialty and registration with the Indian Medical Council.
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in a relevant specialty (Master's degree or Post Graduate Diploma) from a recognized university. Valid and alive registration with the Indian Medical Council (currently National Medical Commission) or any State Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix Level-13 Pay Scale: ₹67,300 - ₹2,13,100 Includes Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per state government rules.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CGPSC Psychiatrist Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CGPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.chhattisgarh_public_service_commission_c: Postgraduate degree in a relevant specialty and registration with the Indian Medical Council.

content_sections.heading: CGPSC Psychiatrist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CGPSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CGPSC Psychiatrist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CGPSC Psychiatrist Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in a relevant specialty (Master's degree or Post Graduate Diploma) from a recognized university. Valid and alive registration with the Indian Medical Council (currently National Medical Commission) or any State Medical Council.

rows.category: Other categories & residents of other states

content_sections.heading: CGPSC Psychiatrist Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. Specific relaxations include: Chhattisgarh residents: Up to 40 years SC/ST/OBC: 5 years Chhattisgarh Govt. Employees: Up to 38 years Retrenched Govt. Servants: Up to 3 years (max) Ex-Servicemen: 3 years Chhattisgarh Local Women: 10 years Widow/Divorcee/Separated Women: 5 years Awardees/Players: 5 years Contractual Employees: Service period (max 38 years) Disabled Persons: 5 years Education Personnel/Panchayat Personnel: Up to 45 years Inter-Caste Marriage Scheme Beneficiaries: 5 years

content_sections.heading: CGPSC Psychiatrist Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Pay Matrix Level-13 Pay Scale: ₹67,300 - ₹2,13,100 Includes Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per state government rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CGPSC Psychiatrist Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CGPSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CGPSC Psychiatrist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CGPSC Psychiatrist recruitment is 19 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Psychiatrist post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Psychiatrist post is 25 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Psychiatrist post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Psychiatrist post is 35 years, with relaxations applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the CGPSC Psychiatrist recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies based on category. Chhattisgarh SC/ST/OBC & PWD residents need to pay ₹300, while other categories and residents of other states need to pay ₹400, plus portal charges and GST.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Psychiatrist position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Psychiatrist Position includes a Written Examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Psychiatrist post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Psychiatrist post is as per Pay Matrix Level-13, ranging from ₹67,300 to ₹2,13,100 per month, along with applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential qualifications required for the Psychiatrist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in a relevant specialty and have valid registration with the Indian Medical Council or any State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Psychiatrist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Psychiatrist post, all under the backlog category.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for CGPSC Psychiatrist recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article or from the official CGPSC website.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, residents of other states can apply for this recruitment, but they will fall under the 'Other categories' for application fee payment.
